design_philosophy: Objective, rigid, and functional. Since the user mandated 'Arial', we combat the 'generic Word document' feel by employing the 'Swiss Brutalist' technique: extreme weight contrasts (Black vs. Regular), aggressive tight tracking on headings, sharp 1px borders, and flat surfaces. No shadows, no gradients. Data density is prioritized via strict grid systems.

typography.strategy: The Swiss Brutalist approach: Enforce extreme weight contrasts and tight letter spacing to create deliberate architectural tension. Never center headings. Strict left alignment.

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: The Control Room Grid. Dense layouts. Use gap-4 to gap-6 for dashboards. App frame includes a collapsible left sidebar, sticky top bar, and main content area.
spacing_and_layout.containers: Flat #FFFFFF backgrounds with 1px solid border-black/10. NO box-shadows. Internal padding p-6 or p-8.
spacing_and_layout.kanban: 4 explicit columns (Onboarding, Active, Exiting, Exited). Columns must have h-full and vertical scrolling. Cards within must have 1px borders.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-sm (2px to 4px max) for an industrial, precise aesthetic.

components.buttons: Flat, sharp corners (rounded-sm), solid #FF353F for primary, solid #191919 for secondary. Clear hover states with background darkening.
components.inputs: Customize Shadcn primitives: flat background, sharp 1px borders, focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#FF353F].
components.badges: Small, uppercase, font-bold, tracking-wide, slightly rounded. Use exact colors specified in status_badges.
components.ai_agent_panel: Fixed right slide-in panel. Must have a distinct 1px left border. Use monospace typography for AI generated text outputs to distinguish from HR system data.

hero_login_bg.description: Modern vehicle inspection bay for login background to establish brand context.

interactions.hover: Subtle background color shifts, 0.2s ease transitions. Do not use scale transforms (no bouncing).
interactions.focus: High contrast ring focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#191919] ring-offset-2 focus:outline-none.

accessibility_and_testing.test_ids: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-btn').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure dark text on light backgrounds always passes minimum 4.5:1 ratio.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use exact hex codes provided for brand and statuses.
Implement the Kanban dashboard using the 'Control Room Grid' philosophy.
Do not use Shadcn default shadows (remove them). Rely on 1px borders.
Ensure the AI Panel is always accessible and visible for the HR Admin role.
